remaining_tasks.name: Human verification checkpoint — re-test after focus bug fix

blockers.description: UAT step 5 (Ctrl+D split) cursor freezes after split resize. Possibly step 7 (pane resize) too.
blockers.workaround: Fix applied this session: removed set_focus(true) from re-realize path; moved cell storage before grab_focus. Needs UAT re-test.

human_actions_pending.context: Two focus bugs fixed. Confirm split+resize cursor freeze resolved. If still broken, collect debug log (eprintln in EventControllerFocus enter/leave).

decisions.rationale: Was incorrectly refocusing old pane during split — both panes got focused=true, killing new pane cursor blink. EventControllerFocus enter handles restoration now.
EventControllerFocus enter was no-op (cell=None) during realize. Must store first.

next_action: cargo build && ./target/debug/cmux-linux — re-test UAT steps 5-12. If passing, approve 02-06 checkpoint and run /gsd:execute-phase 02 to complete verification.
context_notes: Phase 02 is 8/9 plans done. Only 02-06 (human UAT) remains. UAT 1-4 passed. Step 5 (split right) and window resize caused cursor freeze. Root cause: surface.rs re-realize was calling set_focus(old,true) unconditionally on every split. Fixed. Build passes.
